title: Assign Emergency Flight Priority Slot
description: The system shall assign an immediate priority slot to a flight marked as an emergency, overriding normal scheduling rules.
rationale: To ensure that emergency flights are accommodated without delay and can be prioritized over other scheduled flights.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency by ensuring critical flights are handled promptly, reducing the risk of delays or safety issues.

source.description: As a air traffic controller I need to declare an emergency for a flight and have the system assign an immediate priority slot overriding normal scheduling rules So that the emergency flight can be prioritized and accommodated without delay

acceptance_criteria: The system assigns an immediate priority slot to a flight marked as an emergency.
Other scheduled slots are automatically adjusted to accommodate the emergency flight.
preconditions: A flight is identified in the system with a valid identifier.
The air traffic controller has the necessary permissions to mark a flight as an emergency.
postconditions: The emergency flight has been assigned a priority slot.
Other scheduled flights have been adjusted to accommodate the emergency flight.
functional_constraints: The system must override normal scheduling rules when marking a flight as an emergency.
All other scheduled slots must be automatically adjusted in real-time upon assignment of an emergency slot.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system must respond within [specific time frame] to mark a flight as an emergency and assign a priority slot.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time during operational hours.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must support up to [number] simultaneous flights without degrading performance.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error handling for invalid flight identifiers should provide clear, actionable feedback.

edge_cases: What happens if a flight is already in an emergency state and another emergency declaration is made?
How does the system handle simultaneous declarations of multiple emergencies?
What is the impact on other critical flights when an emergency slot is assigned?
dependencies: The flight management system must be able to receive and process emergency declarations.
The database must support real-time updates for slot assignments.

interfaces.name: Emergency Declaration API
interfaces.description: Used by the air traffic controller to mark a flight as an emergency.

interfaces.name: Flight Management Database
interfaces.description: Stores flight information and slot assignments.

test_cases.description: Marking a flight as an emergency when no other flights are scheduled.
test_cases.expected_result: The system assigns the highest priority slot to the emergency flight.
All emergency flights receive priority slots and other slots are adjusted accordingly.
